Definition: Annualized return to investors after all fees (mgmt + perf)
Decision_Making_Impact: Primary metric for investor attractiveness and market competitiveness

Definition: Net Asset Value of one UPT token (Value-Accrual Model)
Decision_Making_Impact: Determines real-time entry/exit pricing and capital appreciation

Definition: Difference between projected and actual realized yield
Decision_Making_Impact: Measures accuracy of financial models and operational stability

Definition: Total management and performance fees as a % of TVL
Decision_Making_Impact: Evaluates cost efficiency; helps decide on fee structure adjustments

Definition: Total UJEUR currently held or deployed by the pool
Decision_Making_Impact: Indicates scale; determines capacity for new industrial financing

Definition: Percentage of pool capital currently deployed to Industrials
Decision_Making_Impact: Decide when to stop/start fundraising vs. industrial onboarding

Definition: Yield impact caused by un-deployed capital in the pool
Decision_Making_Impact: Triggers 'Stop-Fundraising' logic to protect current APY

Definition: UJEUR available for immediate investor exit (Reserve)
Decision_Making_Impact: Ensures solvency and investor confidence during exit windows

Definition: Percentage of industrial financings in default (>90 days)
Decision_Making_Impact: Triggers recovery protocols and Dutch Auction liquidations

Definition: Exposure to the single largest Industrial partner
Decision_Making_Impact: Decide on diversification strategy and exposure caps per partner

Definition: Weighted average risk score (AAA to B) of the pool
Decision_Making_Impact: Used for institutional reporting and risk-weighted capital allocation

Definition: Value of UJG Tokens (Guarantee) vs. Deployed Funds
Decision_Making_Impact: Safety margin for recovery; determines loan-to-value (LTV) limits

Definition: % of investors with fully verified active identity status
Decision_Making_Impact: Absolute requirement; determines legal standing and audit readiness

Definition: Total number of unique compliant institutional addresses
Decision_Making_Impact: Measures ecosystem growth and investor base decentralization

Definition: Number of unique 'Allowed' countries in the pool
Decision_Making_Impact: Mitigates local regulatory risk and currency-specific shocks

Definition: % increase in processing capacity of financed factories
Decision_Making_Impact: Measures success of mission-aligned growth; future yield driver

Definition: Ratio of processed goods value vs. raw commodity value
Decision_Making_Impact: Justifies ESG mandates and government-level support in Africa

Definition: Local jobs supported per €1M of pool financing
Decision_Making_Impact: Critical for ESG reporting required by Development Finance Institutions
